content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Apex Logistics Co.
Customer ID: C002
Contract ID: K014
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: Renewal Check-in
Date: October 8, 2024
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Brian Calloway (VP of Operations)

James Okafor: Brian, we're coming up on the end of your second year. Wanted to get ahead of the renewal and hear how things are going across all six offices.

Brian Calloway: Overall it's been good. The regional teams use it daily. My one gripe — and I've mentioned this before — is that the mobile app on Android still has a sync delay when users are in our warehouse facilities. The connectivity there is spotty and the app doesn't handle it as gracefully as the desktop version.

James Okafor: I hear you on that. I flagged it with our product team earlier this year. It's on the roadmap but I don't have a firm timeline. I'll push for an update this week and get back to you.

Brian Calloway: I appreciate that. It's not a dealbreaker but it's come up in feedback from three of the six offices now, so it's worth tracking.

James Okafor: Understood. On the renewal itself — are you happy at 50 users or do you want to model out adding the freight broker use case you mentioned last year?

Brian Calloway: Let's stay at 55 users for now. We added five ops coordinators in Q3. Keep the freight broker idea on the shelf for 2026.

James Okafor: Works for me. I'll get renewal paperwork over by end of the month.
